narrative:
Paulding Village 2 (precinct in Paulding County) has 790 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
